note: Intended design: /gogo:done gains a post-selection separate-vs-merged gate, and ALL entry-writing unifies into one synthesis writer (1..N members): high-level report.md (never a full-report copy), slug-prefixed merged diagrams + before/, manifest members[], each member flipped to shipped. Selection surfaces (TUI board / fallback / +-joined arg) unchanged; board.py untouched; audit trail stays in .gogo/work/. As-is baseline in charts/before/.

diagrams.title: Intended: /gogo:done separate-vs-merged gate + one synthesis writer (1..N members)
